roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: INSTRUCTION AND ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/X: DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMUR/LDPX: 06-18-18/987,2/ACM/WS/X: AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, DEFENDANT MUST DO AS FOLLOWS:/X: DEFENDANT SHALL CONSENT TO UNANNOUNCED EXAMINATION OF ANY PEACE  OFFICER OF ANY AND ALL ELECTRONIC DEVICES/X: DEFENDANT SHALL NOT FREQUENT ORVISIT PLACES THAT EXIST PRIMARILY FOR THE ENJOYMENT OF MINORS OR WHERE MINORS CONGREGATE/X: DEFENDANT SHALL NOT WORK OR VOLUNTEER IN AN OCCUPATION,POSITION,  OR SETTING WHICH TYPICALLY CATERS TO MINORS/X: DEFENDANT NOT TOINITIATE, ESTABLISH OR MAINTAIN CONTACT WITH MINORS/X: DEFENDANT SHALL NOT KNOWINGLY POSSESS ANY TYPE OF PORNOGRAPHY IN WRITTEN OR ELECTRONIC FORM//X: DEFENDANT MUST PROVIDE PASSWORDS TO ANY AND ALL ELECTRONIC DEVICES  UPON REQUEST BY A PEACE OFFICER/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL: INSTRUCTION AND ARRAINGMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/NP/CONTD I&A P&C DOP/X:DEFENDANT IS ORDERED PRESENT THROUGH THE SHERIFF'S DEPT/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/TWA/DOP/
/NP/DEF:IS IN CUSTODY HOWEVER HE IS IN THE SAFETY CELL AND UNABLE TO BE TRANSPORTED TO COURT/BAIL:115000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/NP/X:THE PEOPLE INFORM THE COURT THAT DEFENDANTIS DECEASED,/MO PC 1385/
